description_long: This is a two-story modern house with a simple, boxy structure and a flat, slightly sloped roof. The exterior is predominantly white with minimal ornamentation, featuring a mix of rectangular and square windows with brown trim. The front facade includes a small covered porch area supported by columns, and a single main door with a window above it. The house sits on a circular patch of green grass, suggesting a suburban or urban lot. The rear and side elevations are plainer, with fewer windows and no visible back entry. The overall design is functional and contemporary, with clean lines and a focus on geometric forms.
description: A modern, two-story white house with a flat roof, brown-trimmed windows, and a small covered porch on a grassy lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry door, covered porch, and two windows with brown trim.
description_view_1: Rear view with a plain wall, a single door, and minimal window openings.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting a single square window and the extended roofline.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a window and partial view of the porch structure.
attribute_entryway_design: Single main door with a small covered porch supported by columns and a window above.
